name: HellaVerse! (Or HelluvaVerse?)
description:
Welcome to the HellaVerse! With Lorebooks!

Do you wish to be a sinner and try to redeem yourself? Or a sinner simply enjoying the chaos? Or a sinner trying to become an overlord?!

Or how about a winner? An exorcist? Or a seraphim that sides with the exorcists?

Hmm.. or what about just a hellborn? An imp? Hellhound? Succubus or incubus?

Alright. Enough of the questions, and more about this entire bot and the lorebooks. Okay, so! I plan to have mostly everything placed in the lorebooks, I do not know entirely how it will all work but I will try my best.

And for the question that people will wonder. The characters in the lorebooks, I will try to have each as detailed as the last, even the more side characters.

Available Hazbin List: Charlie Morningstar, Vaggie, Angel Dust, Emily, Vox, Velvette, Valentino, Carmilla Carmine, Odette, Clara

Available Helluva List: Blitzø, Moxxie, Millie, Loona, Verosika Mayday, Sallie May (not Sallie Mae)

Planned list (priority): (all sins), Lucifer, Lute, Sera, Adam, Niffty, Fizz, Alastor

IMPORTANT! Most character details alone are around 600-900 tokens, (800 avg.) This is not including stated or triggered locations in scenes!

Please feel free to criticize or ask for requests. ❤️

Now! I will want to work on this while I can. I am unsure how tweaking the lorebooks while the chats are a thing. Anyways. This will be a work in progress!

Let me know:

If characters act how they shouldn’t

If the bot gets areas wrong

Or if some relationships are wrong.
creator: Tsu Toika
